arts.ttl: Barcelona will 'scout' two Monaco players during Champions League clash
arts.sum: Barcelona will allegedly scout Monaco duo Caio Henrique and Vanderson during Thursday's Champions League contest.

arts.ttl: Possible lineup for Barcelona against Monaco in Champions League opener
arts.sum: FC Barcelona head to the principality of Monaco for their Champions League opener as they face Les Rouges et Blanc who have also started well in Ligue 1 with Adi Hütter’s men sitting in third place in the table with three games and one draw from their opening four fixtures. Ter Stegen; Koundé, Cubarsí, Iñigo, Balde; Casadó, Pedri; Lamine, Raphinha, Ferran; and Lewandowski are all set to start for Barça with Pedri set to start in an attacking midfield capacity.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Barcelona are aiming to continue their perfect record under Hansi Flick when they begin their Champions League campaign at AS Monaco on Thursday evening. The new manager of the Catalan giants hasn't tasted defeat since losing to Monaco 3-0 in pre-season, winning all five of Barcelona's La Liga games.
